::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(readxl, SmartEDA, tidyverse,
               ggstatsplot, easystats, tidymodels)
```
:::




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
car_resale <- read_xlsx("data/ToyotaCorolla.xlsx",
                        sheet = "data")
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ExpCatStat(car_resale,
           Target = "Price",
           result = "Stat")
```

:::
:::




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
model <- lm(Price ~ Age_08_04 + Mfg_Year + KM + 
              Weight + Guarantee_Period, data = car_resale)
model
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
lm(formula = Price ~ Age_08_04 + Mfg_Year + KM + Weight + Guarantee_Period, 
    data = car_resale)

Coefficients:
     (Intercept)         Age_08_04          Mfg_Year                KM  
       5.677e+04        -1.839e+02        -1.599e+01        -4.702e-02  
          Weight  Guarantee_Period  
       9.596e-02         2.052e+00  
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
check_collinearity(model)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# Check for Multicollinearity

Low Correlation

             Term  VIF        VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
           Weight 1.00 [ 1.00, 4.74e+06]     1.00      1.00     [0.00, 1.00]
 Guarantee_Period 1.00 [ 1.00,      Inf]     1.00      1.00     [0.00, 1.00]

High Correlation

      Term   VIF        VIF 95% CI adj. VIF Tolerance Tolerance 95% CI
 Age_08_04 32.24 [29.14,    35.68]     5.68      0.03     [0.03, 0.03]
  Mfg_Year 15.55 [14.08,    17.18]     3.94      0.06     [0.06, 0.07]
        KM 18.15 [16.43,    20.06]     4.26      0.06     [0.05, 0.06]
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
check_c <- check_collinearity(model)
plot(check_c)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
model1 <- lm(Price ~ Age_08_04 + KM + 
              Weight + Guarantee_Period, data = car_resale)
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
check_n <- check_normality(model1)
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(check_n)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
check_h <- check_heteroscedasticity(model1)
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(check_h)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
check_model(model1)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(parameters::parameters(model1))
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggcoefstats(model1, 
            output = "plot")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_04_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-14-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
